overview: The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Gandhinagar, located in Palaj, Gujarat, is an Institute of National Importance known for its interdisciplinary approach, research-driven education, innovation ecosystem, and sustainable 5-star green campus.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance recognized by the Government of India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹2,00,000 per year for General/OBC students. Full and partial tuition fee waivers available based on category and family income. Additional other fees around ₹15,000 annually. Hostel & Mess charges approximately ₹55,000 – ₹65,000 per year.
₹20,000 – ₹40,000 per year depending on specialization. Eligible students receive monthly stipends based on GATE qualification.
₹10,000 – ₹20,000 per year with additional hostel and academic charges
₹20,000 – ₹30,000 per year. Research scholars receive fellowships/stipends based on NET/GATE and institute norms.

placements.placementRate: B.Tech CSE: 95.00%, Mechanical Engineering: 90.00%, Chemical Engineering: 85.71%
placements.totalOffers: 150+ offers in 2024-25 with over 166 B.Tech students placed
placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Oracle, Texas Instruments, Rakuten, Barclays, Salesforce
placements.internationalOffers: International and high-value offers reported from global technology firms

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level entrance examinations followed by JoSAA, COAP, or JAM counseling depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Follows JoSAA, COAP, and IIT academic admission schedules.

campus.specialNote: IIT Gandhinagar is known for its award-winning dining system, sustainable architecture, interdisciplinary curriculum, and student-centric academic flexibility.

scholarships.meritCumMeans: 100% tuition fee waiver for General/OBC students with family income < ₹1 LPA; 2/3rd waiver for income between ₹1–₹5 LPA.
scholarships.donorScholarships: Special grants and donor-supported scholarships for needy and meritorious students.
scholarships.stipends: M.Tech and Ph.D. students receive monthly stipends of ₹12,400 to ₹31,000+ based on GATE/NET qualifications.

contact.address: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar, Palaj, Gandhinagar – 382355, Gujarat, India
